title: tragia cinerea
intro: Tragia cinerea, also known as the grey milkwort, is a plant species that belongs to the family Euphorbiaceae, commonly found in tropical and subtropical regions. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Tragia cinerea include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support the immune system. Tragia cinerea can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or decoction, and is often used in herbal remedies to treat various ailments, including colds, coughs, and skin conditions.
